message:
test(bd-2p5h): cover session persistence across re-initialization

Add 5 new tests for session.rs verifying that log_level,
resource_subscriptions, and state survive re-initialization,
that notify_resource_updated fires independently per subscription,
and that supports_elicitation/supports_roots return false before init.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
